case_title: DAVID M ZEFF VS. BRUCE A SHINNEMAN et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-26-2003 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER ZEFF, DAVID M AS TO RESPONDENT SHINNEMAN, BRUCE A SHINNEMAN, PATRICIA M JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR ORDER CONFIRMING ARBITRATION AWARD, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER ZEFF, DAVID M HEARING SET FOR AUG-26-2003 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER DAVID ZEFF'S PETITION FOR ORDER CONFIRMING ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED - NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER AND JUDGMENT WERE SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: KEVIN M. MCCARTHY REPORTER: MITCH LYON, CSR #6840.
